description: Object-based Lightning Type schema for Contractor Incident (v4, API 65.0-aligned, date/time as text).
title: ahaContractorIncidentOBLTv4

incidentDateTimeString.title: incidentDateTimeString
incidentDateTimeString.description: Appears as 'Date' : related to section Details of Reported Incident (Emergency Deployment)

caseReference.title: caseReference
caseReference.description: Appears as 'Case Ref' : The Case Reference Number.

businesUnit.title: businesUnit
businesUnit.description: Appears as 'Client' : The Housing Association group company, or business unit

region.title: region
region.description: Appears as 'Region' : Describes the geographical area of the incident

claimantName.title: claimantName
claimantName.description: Appears as 'Claimant Name' : Usually first and last names combined into a single string

customerPhone.title: customerPhone
customerPhone.description: One of the phone fields, use the first one that's populated

customerEmail.title: customerEmail
customerEmail.description: Appears as 'Email Address' : customer email (not ' Fax/Email')

policyScheme.title: policyScheme
policyScheme.description: Appears as 'Scheme' related to Policy Details

policyNumber.title: policyNumber
policyNumber.description: Appears as 'Policy Number' : related to Policy Details

contractorGroup.title: contractorGroup
contractorGroup.description: Appears as 'Contractor Group' : A business unit of the Housing Association

reportedProblem.title: reportedProblem
reportedProblem.description: Appears as 'Reported Problem' : relates to the Details of the reported incident

fault.title: fault
fault.description: Appears as 'Fault' : relates to the Details of the reported incident

jobStatus.title: jobStatus
jobStatus.description: Appears as 'Job Status / Outcome' : related to the Details of Reported Incident.

jobDescription.title: jobDescription
jobDescription.description: Appears as 'Description' : relates to Details of Reported Incident section

reasonForEscalation.title: reasonForEscalation
reasonForEscalation.description: Appears as 'Reason For Escalation' : relates to Escalation Details Section

escalationNotes.title: escalationNotes
escalationNotes.description: Appears as 'Escalation Notes' : relates to Escalation Details section

customersAffected.title: customersAffected
customersAffected.description: Appears as 'No. of Customers Affected' : a numeric value

jobAddress.title: jobAddress
jobAddress.description: Appears as 'Address' : relates to Customer section

affectedAddress.title: affectedAddress
affectedAddress.description: Appears as 'Address of Properties Affected' : relates to Escalation Details section

decantAddress.title: decantAddress
decantAddress.description: Appears as 'Decant Address' : relates to Escalation Details section

caseEscalated.title: caseEscalated
caseEscalated.description: Appears as 'Case Escalated' : relates to Policy Details section

awaabsLaw.title: awaabsLaw
awaabsLaw.description: Appears as 'Awaabs Law' : relates to Policy Details section

decant.title: decant
decant.description: Appears as 'Decant Y/N' : relates to Escalation Details

petsDecanted.title: petsDecanted
petsDecanted.description: Appears as 'Pets Decanted' : relates to Escalation Details

transportArranged.title: transportArranged
transportArranged.description: Appears as 'Transport Arranged' : relates to Escalation Details

activityHistory.title: activityHistory
activityHistory.description: A collection of entries describing Job offer history status and final outcome
